TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_minzhu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira kuya ccay a rumi'ad masunitu ku ngiha nu 'ayam i ira ku malingaday tayratu i umah malingad.
S.PHON: ira kuja ʦʦaj a rumiʡaɬ~ɮ masunitu ku ŋiħa nu ʡajam i ira ku maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj tajratu i umaħ maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: ira kuya ccay a rumi'ad masunitu ku ngiha nu 'ayam i ira ku malingaday tayratu i umah malingad.
S.PHON: ira kuja ʦʦaj a rumiʡaɬ~ɮ masunitu ku ŋiħa nu ʡajam i ira ku maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj tajratu i umaħ maɾiŋaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 雞啼.有一天,有一個農夫到田裡工作.
The rooster crowed. One day, there was a farmer who went to the farmland to work.

S.FORM: nika u tayal nira i u mipitpitay tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: nika u tajaɾ nira i u mipitpitaj tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: nika u tayal nira i u mipitpitay tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: nika u tajaɾ nira i u mipitpitaj tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他的工作是摘水果的.
His work was pick fruits.

S.FORM: 'adihay ku heci nu kilang nira.
S.PHON: ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ku ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ nira.
S.FORM: 'adihay ku heci nu kilang nira.
S.PHON: ʡaɬ~ɮiħaj ku ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ nira.
S.TRANSL: 他的果實纍纍.
His fruits were plenty.

S.FORM: mipatala cira tu tulu a fakar sapipatala nira tu heci nu kilang saka tayra cira i umah nira a mipitpit.
S.PHON: mipataɾa ʦira tu tuɾu a fakar sapipataɾa nira tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ saka tajra ʦira i umaħ nira a mipitpit.
S.FORM: mipatala cira tu tulu a fakar sapipatala nira tu heci nu kilang saka tayra cira i umah nira a mipitpit.
S.PHON: mipataɾa ʦira tu tuɾu a fakar sapipataɾa nira tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ saka tajra ʦira i umaħ nira a mipitpit.
S.TRANSL: 他準備三個簍筐,準備用來要裝果實的,所以他去田裡摘.

TRANSL.notes: He prepared three baskets for holding the fruits, so he went to the farmland to pick (fruits).

S.TRANSL: He prepared three baskets for holding the fruits, so he went to the farmland to pick .

S.FORM: pitpit sa cira tu kilang a mikalic tu kawal tayra i kilang i.
S.PHON: pitpit sa ʦira tu kiɾaŋ a mikaɾiʦ tu kawaɾ tajra i kiɾaŋ i.
S.FORM: pitpit sa cira tu kilang a mikalic tu kawal tayra i kilang i.
S.PHON: pitpit sa ʦira tu kiɾaŋ a mikaɾiʦ tu kawaɾ tajra i kiɾaŋ i.
S.TRANSL: 他爬樓梯去摘果樹.
He climbed up the ladder to pick fruits.

S.FORM: teli nira itini i ka'ayaw nu patalaan nira tu pitelian tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: təɾi nira itini i kaʡajaw nu pataɾaan nira tu pitəɾian tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: teli nira itini i ka'ayaw nu patalaan nira tu pitelian tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: təɾi nira itini i kaʡajaw nu pataɾaan nira tu pitəɾian tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 他放置在他前面準備裝水果的(袋子).

S.TRANSL: 他放置在他前面準備裝水果的 .

TRANSL.notes: He put (the fruits) in (the bag) that he had prepared to hold the fruits.

S.TRANSL: He put in that he had prepared to hold the fruits.

S.FORM: u ruray nira mipitpit maharateng aku ku u ruray nu malingaday nu mita matiya u malingaday itini i niyaro' nu mita.
S.PHON: u ruraj nira mipitpit maħaratəŋ aku ku u ruraj nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj nu mita matija u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj itini i nijaro~uʡ nu mita.
S.FORM: u ruray nira mipitpit maharateng aku ku u ruray nu malingaday nu mita matiya u malingaday itini i niyaro' nu mita.
S.PHON: u ruraj nira mipitpit maħaratəŋ aku ku u ruraj nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj nu mita matija u maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj itini i nijaro~uʡ nu mita.
S.TRANSL: 他摘水果的辛苦,使我想起我們農夫的辛苦,很像在我們部落的農夫一樣.
His toil of picking fruits is reminiscent of our toil as farmers, like the farmers in our village.

S.FORM: huni maherektu cingra mipitpit i patayraentu nira i fakar nira.
S.PHON: ħuni maħərəktu ʦiŋra mipitpit i patajraəntu nira i fakar nira.
S.FORM: huni maherektu cingra mipitpit i patayraentu nira i fakar nira.
S.PHON: ħuni maħərəktu ʦiŋra mipitpit i patajraəntu nira i fakar nira.
S.TRANSL: 沒多久,他摘完之後,裝到他的簍筐去.

TRANSL.notes: Before long, (after) he finished picking the fruits, he put them in his basket.

S.TRANSL: Before long, he finished picking the fruits, he put them in his basket.

S.FORM: paruhan nira i nengnenghan ca'ay katumes ku tulu a fakar tusa ku matumel matumesay.
S.PHON: paruħan nira i nəŋnəŋħan ʦaʡaj katuməs ku tuɾu a fakar tusa ku matuməɾ matuməsaj.
S.FORM: paruhan nira i nengnenghan ca'ay katumes ku tulu a fakar tusa ku matumel matumesay.
S.PHON: paruħan nira i nəŋnəŋħan ʦaʡaj katuməs ku tuɾu a fakar tusa ku matuməɾ matuməsaj.
S.TRANSL: 他裝起來,看起來三個簍筐都沒有滿,只有裝滿兩個.

TRANSL.notes: He put them (in the baskets), but the three baskets didn't seem to be full. (Only) two were full.

S.TRANSL: He put them , but the three baskets didn't seem to be full. two were full.

S.FORM: saka miliyaw ho cingra mikalic i tayra i kilang nira mipitpit tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: saka miɾijaw ħo~u ʦiŋra mikaɾiʦ i tajra i kiɾaŋ nira mipitpit tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: saka miliyaw ho cingra mikalic i tayra i kilang nira mipitpit tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: saka miɾijaw ħo~u ʦiŋra mikaɾiʦ i tajra i kiɾaŋ nira mipitpit tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 所以重新爬到樹上去,繼續摘果實.
So he climbed up the tree again to pick fruits.

S.FORM: ya mipitpit cingra tura heci nu kilang i.
S.PHON: ja mipitpit ʦiŋra tura ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ i.
S.FORM: ya mipitpit cingra tura heci nu kilang i.
S.PHON: ja mipitpit ʦiŋra tura ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ i.
S.TRANSL: 他正在摘果實.
He was picking fruits.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay mikitingay tu siri a fa'inayan mita'elif itini i la'enu nu pipitpitan nira tu kilang.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj mikitiŋaj tu siri a faʡinajan mitaʡəɾif itini i ɾaʡənu nu pipitpitan nira tu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay mikitingay tu siri a fa'inayan mita'elif itini i la'enu nu pipitpitan nira tu kilang.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj mikitiŋaj tu siri a faʡinajan mitaʡəɾif itini i ɾaʡənu nu pipitpitan nira tu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 有個男人牽一隻羊,經過他摘果實的樹下.

TRANSL.notes: There was a man pulling a goat along; (he) passed the tree where he picked fruits.

S.TRANSL: There was a man pulling a goat along; passed the tree where he picked fruits.

S.FORM: mipitpit cingra tu kilang i sanengnengnengneng sa'an kiya siri tura heci nu kilang sakakuma'enan.
S.PHON: mipitpit ʦiŋra tu kiɾaŋ i sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋ saʡan kija siri tura ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ sakakumaʡənan.
S.FORM: mipitpit cingra tu kilang i sanengnengnengneng sa'an kiya siri tura heci nu kilang sakakuma'enan.
S.PHON: mipitpit ʦiŋra tu kiɾaŋ i sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋ saʡan kija siri tura ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ sakakumaʡənan.
S.TRANSL: 當他摘果實的時候,羊東張西望,想吃水果.
When he was picking fruits, the goat looked around and wanted to eat the fruits.

S.FORM: nika tengteng tengtenghan nira tayra i mita'eliftu mita'elif tura pipitpitan tura kilang tuya heci itira.
S.PHON: nika təŋtəŋ təŋtəŋħan nira tajra i mitaʡəɾiftu mitaʡəɾif tura pipitpitan tura kiɾaŋ tuja ħəʦi itira.
S.FORM: nika tengteng tengtenghan nira tayra i mita'eliftu mita'elif tura pipitpitan tura kilang tuya heci itira.
S.PHON: nika təŋtəŋ təŋtəŋħan nira tajra i mitaʡəɾiftu mitaʡəɾif tura pipitpitan tura kiɾaŋ tuja ħəʦi itira.
S.TRANSL: 羊經過了摘果實的樹.

TRANSL.notes: The goat passed the tree where (he) picked fruits.

S.TRANSL: The goat passed the tree where picked fruits.

S.FORM: ta afa miha halafintu i ira ku ccay a ka'emangay wawa mikulisiw mita'elif tura pipitpitan nira tura kilang a heci i.
S.PHON: ta afa miħa ħaɾafintu i ira ku ʦʦaj a kaʡəmaŋaj wawa mikuɾisiw mitaʡəɾif tura pipitpitan nira tura kiɾaŋ a ħəʦi i.
S.FORM: ta afa miha halafintu i ira ku ccay a ka'emangay wawa mikulisiw mita'elif tura pipitpitan nira tura kilang a heci i.
S.PHON: ta afa miħa ħaɾafintu i ira ku ʦʦaj a kaʡəmaŋaj wawa mikuɾisiw mitaʡəɾif tura pipitpitan nira tura kiɾaŋ a ħəʦi i.
S.TRANSL: 又有一位年輕的小孩騎腳踏車,經過他摘果實的樹.

TRANSL.notes: There was a child riding a bike; (the child) passed the tree where he picked fruits.

S.TRANSL: There was a child riding a bike; passed the tree where he picked fruits.

S.FORM: maaraw nuya wawa kuya heci i sapialaan.
S.PHON: maaraw nuja wawa kuja ħəʦi i sapiaɾaan.
S.FORM: maaraw nuya wawa kuya heci i sapialaan.
S.PHON: maaraw nuja wawa kuja ħəʦi i sapiaɾaan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看見那個水果,想拿.
The child saw the fruits and wanted to take them.

S.FORM: ta telihan nira ku kulisiw nira i tatihi.
S.PHON: ta təɾiħan nira ku kuɾisiw nira i tatiħi.
S.FORM: ta telihan nira ku kulisiw nira i tatihi.
S.PHON: ta təɾiħan nira ku kuɾisiw nira i tatiħi.
S.TRANSL: 他把腳踏車停放在他旁邊.
He put his bike by the side.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira kuya malingaday i ca'ay pinengneng cingranan.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira kuja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj i ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ ʦiŋranan.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira kuya malingaday i ca'ay pinengneng cingranan.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira kuja maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj i ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ ʦiŋranan.

TRANSL.notes: 他望著那個農夫,(但農夫)沒有看他.

S.TRANSL: 他望著那個農夫, 沒有看他.

TRANSL.notes: He looked at the farmer, (but the farmer) didn't see him.

S.TRANSL: He looked at the farmer, didn't see him.

S.FORM: sapitakawan tu ccay nika sanengnengnengnenghan nira i.
S.PHON: sapitakawan tu ʦʦaj nika sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋħan nira i.
S.FORM: sapitakawan tu ccay nika sanengnengnengnenghan nira i.
S.PHON: sapitakawan tu ʦʦaj nika sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋħan nira i.

TRANSL.notes: (他)想偷一(簍),東張西望.

S.TRANSL: 想偷一 ,東張西望.

TRANSL.notes: (He) wanted to steal one (basket) and looked around.

S.TRANSL: wanted to steal one and looked around.

S.FORM: ca'ay pinengneng kiya malinagday.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ kija maɾina*ɬ~ɮaj.
S.FORM: ca'ay pinengneng kiya malinagday.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ kija maɾina*ɬ~ɮaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個農夫沒有看他.
The farmer didn't see him.

S.FORM: saka harateng sa cingra i kakoyhan aku ku ccay fakar latek ca'ay pakaaraw saka.
S.PHON: saka ħaratəŋ sa ʦiŋra i kako~ujħan aku ku ʦʦaj fakar ɾatək ʦaʡaj pakaaraw saka.
S.FORM: saka harateng sa cingra i kakoyhan aku ku ccay fakar latek ca'ay pakaaraw saka.
S.PHON: saka ħaratəŋ sa ʦiŋra i kako~ujħan aku ku ʦʦaj fakar ɾatək ʦaʡaj pakaaraw saka.
S.TRANSL: 所以他想,「我抬一筐的水果,說不定他不會看到.」
So he thought, 'If I take one basket, maybe he won't see it.'

S.FORM: alahan nira ku ccay fakar pakafithan nira itini i kulisiw nira ta saharakat satu mita'elif milaliw.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nira ku ʦʦaj fakar pakafitħan nira itini i kuɾisiw nira ta saħarakat satu mitaʡəɾif miɾaɾiw.
S.FORM: alahan nira ku ccay fakar pakafithan nira itini i kulisiw nira ta saharakat satu mita'elif milaliw.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nira ku ʦʦaj fakar pakafitħan nira itini i kuɾisiw nira ta saħarakat satu mitaʡəɾif miɾaɾiw.

TRANSL.notes: 他拿了一簍筐,掛在他的腳踏車上,很快(從樹下)經過,跑掉.

S.TRANSL: 他拿了一簍筐,掛在他的腳踏車上,很快 經過,跑掉.
He took one basket and hung it on his bike, leaving quickly.

S.FORM: salipahak sa cingra a mulaliw i.
S.PHON: saɾipaħak sa ʦiŋra a muɾaɾiw i.
S.FORM: salipahak sa cingra a mulaliw i.
S.PHON: saɾipaħak sa ʦiŋra a muɾaɾiw i.
S.TRANSL: 他暗中自喜地離開.
He left delightedly.

S.FORM: 'ayaw maaraw nira ku ccay a ka'emangay a wawa u fafahian makapah sa'an cingra a minengneng i.
S.PHON: ʡajaw maaraw nira ku ʦʦaj a kaʡəmaŋaj a wawa u fafaħian makapaħ saʡan ʦiŋra a minəŋnəŋ i.
S.FORM: 'ayaw maaraw nira ku ccay a ka'emangay a wawa u fafahian makapah sa'an cingra a minengneng i.
S.PHON: ʡajaw maaraw nira ku ʦʦaj a kaʡəmaŋaj a wawa u fafaħian makapaħ saʡan ʦiŋra a minəŋnəŋ i.
S.TRANSL: 前面看見一個年輕的小女孩,他看了非常漂亮.

TRANSL.notes: He saw a young girl ahead. He saw (her and thought she was) beautiful.

S.TRANSL: He saw a young girl ahead. He saw beautiful.

S.FORM: sanengnengnengnenghan nira saikor saikor sa u fongoh nira minengneng i puling sa kulisiw nira itini i fatad nu lalan.
S.PHON: sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋħan nira saiko~ur saiko~ur sa u fo~uŋo~uħ nira minəŋnəŋ i puɾiŋ sa kuɾisiw nira itini i fataɬ~ɮ nu ɾaɾan.
S.FORM: sanengnengnengnenghan nira saikor saikor sa u fongoh nira minengneng i puling sa kulisiw nira itini i fatad nu lalan.
S.PHON: sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋħan nira saiko~ur saiko~ur sa u fo~uŋo~uħ nira minəŋnəŋ i puɾiŋ sa kuɾisiw nira itini i fataɬ~ɮ nu ɾaɾan.
S.TRANSL: 看來看去,回頭望一望,在路途中騎腳踏車跌倒.
He looked around and turned round to see, falling from his bike halfway.

S.FORM: mapuling cingra i mataktak ma'emin kiya heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: mapuɾiŋ ʦiŋra i mataktak maʡəmin kija ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: mapuling cingra i mataktak ma'emin kiya heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: mapuɾiŋ ʦiŋra i mataktak maʡəmin kija ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒之後,果實全部傾倒出來了.
After he fell down, all the fruits fell off.

S.FORM: s nengnenghan nira ku wa'ay nira i malemes sakira.
S.PHON: s nəŋnəŋħan nira ku waʡaj nira i maɾəməs sakira.
S.FORM: s nengnenghan nira ku wa'ay nira i malemes sakira.
S.PHON: s nəŋnəŋħan nira ku waʡaj nira i maɾəməs sakira.
S.TRANSL: 他看他的腳,流血.
He looked at his foot, which was bleeding.

S.FORM: harateng sa maan satu kaku sa'an.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ sa maan satu kaku saʡan.
S.FORM: harateng sa maan satu kaku sa'an.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ sa maan satu kaku saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 他想,我怎麼辦?
He thought, 'What should I do?'

S.FORM: ca'ahan nira ku fongoh nira i ira ku tatuluay a ka'emangay wawa padanghan nira tura mipudpud tiya kilang.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaħan nira ku fo~uŋo~uħ nira i ira ku tatuɾuaj a kaʡəmaŋaj wawa paɬ~ɮaŋħan nira tura mipuɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ tija kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: ca'ahan nira ku fongoh nira i ira ku tatuluay a ka'emangay wawa padanghan nira tura mipudpud tiya kilang.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaħan nira ku fo~uŋo~uħ nira i ira ku tatuɾuaj a kaʡəmaŋaj wawa paɬ~ɮaŋħan nira tura mipuɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ tija kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他抬頭望,有三個年輕的小孩幫他撿拾水果.
He looked up. There were three children helping him pick up the fruits.

S.FORM: salihaday sa kiya falucuh niya wawa.
S.PHON: saɾiħaɬ~ɮaj sa kija faɾuʦuħ nija wawa.
S.FORM: salihaday sa kiya falucuh niya wawa.
S.PHON: saɾiħaɬ~ɮaj sa kija faɾuʦuħ nija wawa.

TRANSL.notes: 那個小孩(偷東西的那個)感到很輕鬆.

S.TRANSL: 那個小孩 感到很輕鬆.

TRANSL.notes: The child (who stole the fruits) felt lighthearted.

S.TRANSL: The child felt lighthearted.

S.FORM: sanengnenghan nira kuya tatuluay aciyah kuna tatuluay wawa mipadang takuwanan sa'an cingra i.
S.PHON: sanəŋnəŋħan nira kuja tatuɾuaj aʦijaħ kuna tatuɾuaj wawa mipaɬ~ɮaŋ takuwanan saʡan ʦiŋra i.
S.FORM: sanengnenghan nira kuya tatuluay aciyah kuna tatuluay wawa mipadang takuwanan sa'an cingra i.
S.PHON: sanəŋnəŋħan nira kuja tatuɾuaj aʦijaħ kuna tatuɾuaj wawa mipaɬ~ɮaŋ takuwanan saʡan ʦiŋra i.
S.TRANSL: 啊,那三個小孩幫助我,他這麼想.
'Ah, the three children helped me,' he thought.

S.FORM: maherek cingra i mapadang nira kiya tatuluay wawa kiya fakar tara i kafekang atu ya heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: maħərək ʦiŋra i mapaɬ~ɮaŋ nira kija tatuɾuaj wawa kija fakar tara i kafəkaŋ atu ja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: maherek cingra i mapadang nira kiya tatuluay wawa kiya fakar tara i kafekang atu ya heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: maħərək ʦiŋra i mapaɬ~ɮaŋ nira kija tatuɾuaj wawa kija fakar tara i kafəkaŋ atu ja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 完了以後,他幫忙三個小孩把籃子裝在(腳踏車)上面.

S.TRANSL: 完了以後,他幫忙三個小孩把籃子裝在 上面.

TRANSL.notes: After he was done, he helped the three children put the basket on (the bike).

S.TRANSL: After he was done, he helped the three children put the basket on .

S.FORM: ta ma miliyastu cingra.
S.PHON: ta ma miɾijastu ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: ta ma miliyastu cingra.
S.PHON: ta ma miɾijastu ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 然後他離開了.
The he left.

S.FORM: mita'elif kuya tatuluay wawa i maaraw nira kiya.
S.PHON: mitaʡəɾif kuja tatuɾuaj wawa i maaraw nira kija.
S.FORM: mita'elif kuya tatuluay wawa i maaraw nira kiya.
S.PHON: mitaʡəɾif kuja tatuɾuaj wawa i maaraw nira kija.
S.TRANSL: 他看見那三個小孩經過.
He saw the three children go by.

S.FORM: kafong matefad ila'enok i pudpuden nuya ccay ka'emangay wawa.
S.PHON: kafo~uŋ matəfaɬ~ɮ iɾaʡəno~uk i puɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮən nuja ʦʦaj kaʡəmaŋaj wawa.
S.FORM: kafong matefad ila'enok i pudpuden nuya ccay ka'emangay wawa.
S.PHON: kafo~uŋ matəfaɬ~ɮ iɾaʡəno~uk i puɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮən nuja ʦʦaj kaʡəmaŋaj wawa.
S.TRANSL: 帽子掉到地上,一個小孩把它撿起來.
The hat fell onto the ground, and one of the children picked it up.

S.FORM: iyofhan nira ku ngoyos miiyof tuya wawa i saikor a minengneng patikoen kiya kafong ka'emangay wawa kuya mikulisiway.
S.PHON: ijo~ufħan nira ku ŋo~ujo~us miijo~uf tuja wawa i saiko~ur a minəŋnəŋ patiko~uən kija kafo~uŋ kaʡəmaŋaj wawa kuja mikuɾisiwaj.
S.FORM: iyofhan nira ku ngoyos miiyof tuya wawa i saikor a minengneng patikoen kiya kafong ka'emangay wawa kuya mikulisiway.
S.PHON: ijo~ufħan nira ku ŋo~ujo~us miijo~uf tuja wawa i saiko~ur a minəŋnəŋ patiko~uən kija kafo~uŋ kaʡəmaŋaj wawa kuja mikuɾisiwaj.
S.TRANSL: 他吹,回頭看,把帽子還給騎腳踏車的.
He blew and turned around to see, returning the hat to the rider.

S.FORM: harateng sa mitakaway tu heci nu kilang a wawa i aya kafangcal kuna wawa.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ sa mitakawaj tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ a wawa i aja kafaŋʦaɾ kuna wawa.
S.FORM: harateng sa mitakaway tu heci nu kilang a wawa i aya kafangcal kuna wawa.
S.PHON: ħaratəŋ sa mitakawaj tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ a wawa i aja kafaŋʦaɾ kuna wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那個偷水果的小孩想:「唉呀,這三個小孩那麼好.」
The child who stole the fruits thought, 'Ah, the children were so kind.'

S.FORM: pafelihan nira tu heci nu kilang kuya tatuluay alaccay cangra tuya heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: pafəɾiħan nira tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ kuja tatuɾuaj aɾaʦʦaj ʦaŋra tuja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: pafelihan nira tu heci nu kilang kuya tatuluay alaccay cangra tuya heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: pafəɾiħan nira tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ kuja tatuɾuaj aɾaʦʦaj ʦaŋra tuja ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他給三個小孩水果,每個人各一個水果
He gave some fruits to the three children, and each had one fruit.

S.FORM: ta miliyastu kuya wawa.
S.PHON: ta miɾijastu kuja wawa.
S.FORM: ta miliyastu kuya wawa.
S.PHON: ta miɾijastu kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 之後小孩就離開了.
Then, the children left.

S.FORM: huni i ya matu'asay mi malingaday i harateng sa matumestu ku kuna piala aku mangangaytu maepudtu kaku sa'an cingra i.
S.PHON: ħuni i ja matuʡasaj mi maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj i ħaratəŋ sa matuməstu ku kuna piaɾa aku maŋaŋajtu maəpuɬ~ɮtu kaku saʡan ʦiŋra i.
S.FORM: huni i ya matu'asay mi malingaday i harateng sa matumestu ku kuna piala aku mangangaytu maepudtu kaku sa'an cingra i.
S.PHON: ħuni i ja matuʡasaj mi maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj i ħaratəŋ sa matuməstu ku kuna piaɾa aku maŋaŋajtu maəpuɬ~ɮtu kaku saʡan ʦiŋra i.

TRANSL.notes: 後來,那個老人,那個農夫認為,「那個(籃子)摘水果的滿了,我可以下來了.」他這樣想.

S.TRANSL: 後來,那個老人,那個農夫認為,「那個 摘水果的滿了,我可以下來了.」他這樣想.

TRANSL.notes: Then, the old person, the farmer thought, '(the baskets) are full.I could come down,' he thought.

S.TRANSL: Then, the old person, the farmer thought, ' are full.I could come down,' he thought.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira kiya fakar nira i tusatu.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira kija fakar nira i tusatu.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira kiya fakar nira i tusatu.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira kija fakar nira i tusatu.

TRANSL.notes: 他看他的籃子,只剩兩(籃).

S.TRANSL: 他看他的籃子,只剩兩 .
He looked at his baskets, only two left.

S.FORM: oya matumesay i ccaytu kuya 'osaw.
S.PHON: o~uja matuməsaj i ʦʦajtu kuja ʡo~usaw.
S.FORM: oya matumesay i ccaytu kuya 'osaw.
S.PHON: o~uja matuməsaj i ʦʦajtu kuja ʡo~usaw.
S.TRANSL: 那個裝滿的,只剩一個.
Only one was full.

S.FORM: ma tacuwatu kuna mi mialaan aku a heci nu kilang haw sa'an cingra.
S.PHON: ma taʦuwatu kuna mi miaɾaan aku a ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ ħaw saʡan ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: ma tacuwatu kuna mi mialaan aku a heci nu kilang haw sa'an cingra.
S.PHON: ma taʦuwatu kuna mi miaɾaan aku a ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ ħaw saʡan ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 「我摘的水果到哪裡去了呢?」
'Where were the fruits that I picked?'

S.FORM: sanengnengnengneng sa mita'elif kiya tatuluay a widang ya ihoniay tatuluay a wawa mita'elif itira ta la'enu niya kilang i satongihtongih sa tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋ sa mitaʡəɾif kija tatuɾuaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ ja iħo~uniaj tatuɾuaj a wawa mitaʡəɾif itira ta ɾaʡənu nija kiɾaŋ i sato~uŋiħto~uŋiħ sa tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.
S.FORM: sanengnengnengneng sa mita'elif kiya tatuluay a widang ya ihoniay tatuluay a wawa mita'elif itira ta la'enu niya kilang i satongihtongih sa tu heci nu kilang.
S.PHON: sanəŋnəŋnəŋnəŋ sa mitaʡəɾif kija tatuɾuaj a wiɬ~ɮaŋ ja iħo~uniaj tatuɾuaj a wawa mitaʡəɾif itira ta ɾaʡənu nija kiɾaŋ i sato~uŋiħto~uŋiħ sa tu ħəʦi nu kiɾaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: (他)望來望去,(看到)剛才的三個朋友/小孩經過果樹底下,在吃水果.

S.TRANSL: 望來望去, 剛才的三個朋友/小孩經過果樹底下,在吃水果.

TRANSL.notes: He looked around, (seeing) the three friends/children went by eating fruits.

S.TRANSL: He looked around, the three friends/children went by eating fruits.

S.FORM: nika sanengnenghan nira nuya matu'asay kiya tatuluay wawa i na tatuluay haw saharatengharateng sa cingra.
S.PHON: nika sanəŋnəŋħan nira nuja matuʡasaj kija tatuɾuaj wawa i na tatuɾuaj ħaw saħaratəŋħaratəŋ sa ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: nika sanengnenghan nira nuya matu'asay kiya tatuluay wawa i na tatuluay haw saharatengharateng sa cingra.
S.PHON: nika sanəŋnəŋħan nira nuja matuʡasaj kija tatuɾuaj wawa i na tatuɾuaj ħaw saħaratəŋħaratəŋ sa ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 那老人家看那三個小孩,想來想去,「這三個人嗎?」

TRANSL.notes: The old man was looking at the three children, thinking, 'Is it these three people (that stole my fruits)?'

S.TRANSL: The old man was looking at the three children, thinking, 'Is it these three people ?'

S.FORM: ta'elif sa kuya tatuluay a wawa.
S.PHON: taʡəɾif sa kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa.
S.FORM: ta'elif sa kuya tatuluay a wawa.
S.PHON: taʡəɾif sa kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩路過.
The three children went by.

S.FORM: awatu kuna hetini aca ku pakongku aku.
S.PHON: awatu kuna ħətini aʦa ku pako~uŋku aku.
S.FORM: awatu kuna hetini aca ku pakongku aku.
S.PHON: awatu kuna ħətini aʦa ku pako~uŋku aku.
S.TRANSL: 沒有了,我的故事只有這樣.
I'm done with my story.
